name: Search in a 2D matrix
statement: Given a 2-D array mat where the elements of each row are sorted in non-decreasing order, and the first element of a row is greater than the last element of the previous row (if it exists), and an integer target, determine if the target exists in the given mat or not.
constraints:
•   n == mat.length
  •   m == mat[i].length
  •   1 <= m, n <= 100
  •   -104 <= mat[i][j], target <= 104

examples.explanation: The target = 8 exists in the 'mat' at index (1, 3).
The target = 78 does not exist in the 'mat'. Therefore in the output, we see 'false'.
